task.name: Guardian File Access Check
task.objective: Validate file access requests against project-guards rules before any read operation
task.critical-mandate: NEVER allow file reads that match guardian patterns without explicit user approval This is the PRIMARY security layer for DexHub project files

step.title: Load Guardian Rules
Check File Path Against Guardian Patterns
step.input: The absolute path to the file being requested

then.action: STOP - Do not proceed to file read
File outside projects folder - allow read (not protected by project-guards)

step.title: Block Access - Pattern Match
step.action:
Send message to user in {communication_language}:
**🔐 DexHub Guardian - Access Blocked**
Datei: {file_path} Grund: {block_reason}
Diese Datei ist durch DexHub Guardian geschützt. Sichere Dateien (Passwörter, API-Keys, Geheimnisse) können nicht automatisch gelesen werden.
**Optionen:** 1. Die Datei manuell überprüfen (sicherer) 2. Anfragen: Manuelles Kopieren + Einfügen (mit Genehmigung) 3. Datei in sicherer Ordner verschieben (nicht /myDex/projects/)
step.mandate: DO NOT proceed to file read DO NOT attempt to bypass guardian check STOP execution and report to user

step.title: Allow Access - File is Safe
step.action: Proceed with file read operation - file passed all guardian checks

output.on_access_allowed: Return: {access_allowed} = true File read can proceed normally
output.on_access_denied: Return: {access_allowed} = false Return: {access_denied_reason} = blocking reason STOP execution - do not proceed with file read
